description: Phase 4 interchange notes for the AEP Orchestration Lab architecture diagram (aep-architecture-apps).

masterLayoutJson.role: Full round-trip for this app: nodes, labels, userLines (connectors), customBoxes (logos/icons), state overrides, scene graph.
masterLayoutJson.validation: diagram/editor-model.js validateDiagramModel expects migrated v8; model.migrateLayout normalizes older exports.

stackSummaryJson.role: Lightweight export for external tools, spreadsheets, or glue scripts — not a substitute for master JSON import.
stackSummaryJson.importUi: Save & layout → Import stack summary (vendor/icon entries only; connectors not restored)
contains: vendors[] — productLogo / spectrumIcon asset paths and canvas positions
vendors[].catalogTags — optional; added on download when assetPath matches data/architecture-logos.json
connectors[] — user line ids, strokes, points/endpoints when present
source.canonicalNodeIds — keys from the base diagram node position map
stackSummaryJson.externalTools: Third-party stack builders use their own schemas; map vendor names or categories using data/martech-taxonomy-reference.json as a Rosetta stone — do not scrape proprietary catalogs.
